name: Herlin Riley
abstract: Herlin Riley (born February 15, 1957) is an American jazz drummer and a member of the Lincoln Center Jazz Orchestra led by Wynton Marsalis.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Centennial Festival: A Celebration of Jazz: The Carnegie Hall Jazz Band

works.t: We Three Kings of Orient Are

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Rachelle Ferrell, Dianne Reeves, and Kurt Elling: Blue Note Sings and Swings

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: So Herlin Riley gets sick and couldn’t make the recording. So he called me, and I said, yes. I’ll definitely do this... I was on his recording
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: we had a band when Herlin Riley played trumpet... and we had a gig at the top of a hotel... And then we transitioned to a club on Bourbon Street... And we were the house trio.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Slide Hampton
about_quotes.evidence: you made a comment to the band, you went to the drummer, and you talked about your own drum practice... particularly, Herlin Riley was talking about his grandfather
about_quotes.doc_title: Slide Hampton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Evan Christopher
about_quotes.evidence: When I talk to Shannon Powell or Herlin Riley or any of the musicians... they will tell you about the mentoring that they had...
about_quotes.doc_title: Evan Christopher interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 1, 2009

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I wish I could have played with him and had like Herlin Riley, one of the New Orleans – because he’d come from New Orleans.
about_quotes.doc_title: Delfeayo Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Danny Barker
about_quotes.evidence: Herlin know that, because Herlin come up with his uncles [Thad Jones and Hank Jones], and he know what he was doing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Danny Barker — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
